request.description: Live integration with ExchangeRate-API. Returns MYR-based rates with a hardcoded fallback mechanism for offline scenarios.
Mocks a high-latency bank terminal connection. Use card '4111...' to simulate a successful credit card authorization (200 OK).
Administrative endpoint to register new inventory items. Requires a unique barcode and basic pricing data.

response.name: Create Product

request.description: The core transaction engine. Validates stock levels, applies discounts/taxes, deducts inventory, and generates a unique UUID receipt token.
